metadata.description: Cross-repo ops tooling and autonomous workflows for the Umbraco MCP repos — issue automation, branch housekeeping, and the self-learning loop that feeds improvements back into the repos and shared skills.

plugins.name: ai-issue-loop
plugins.description: Work through GitHub issues labelled ready-for-ai in an Umbraco MCP repo, one worktree + subagent per issue (max 3 parallel), driving each to a CI-green PR, then responding to review feedback until approved and merged. Repo-agnostic; runs locally or as a scheduled cloud routine.
